2606.26518.title: NeuraDock Visual Cognitive Load Agent Tutorial: A Quality-Gated Open-Source EEG Workflow for Alpha Dynamics and Real-Time Applications
2606.26518.paper_summary: This tutorial paper provides a step-by-step, reproducible walkthrough of NeuraDock Agent, an open-source EEG agent focused on Alpha dynamics and visual cognitive-load analysis. The goal is practical: a reader should be able to install the agent, run EEG preprocessing and quality control, generate Alpha dynamics figures, perform within-subject Rest/Task visual cognitive-load comparison, run the public mini-dataset analyses and compare them with the reference validation summary, start an online dashboard, call the real-time API from an external application, and use the LLM interpretation layer to explain quality risks. Existing EEG toolkits provide excellent offline analysis, but assembling a real-time, quality-gated cognitive-load pipeline often requires manually bridging acquisition, custom QC, Alpha feature extraction, and a web API; this tutorial closes that offline-to-online gap. The tutorial uses a quality-gated workflow: downstream Alpha and workload metrics are computed only after preprocessing and QC gating rather than directly from raw EEG. In the included mini-dataset validation, the agent processed 18 recordings, generated 10 within-subject comparisons, observed task-related posterior Alpha suppression in 7 of 10 contrasts, estimated initial evidence of within-subject repeatability, and benchmarked local online API latency. The tutorial is intended for researchers, developers, and applied teams who want a transparent path from EEG files to real-time visual cognitive-load prototypes.
2606.26518.paper_summary_zh: 這篇教程論文提供了一個逐步的、可重現的 NeuraDock Agent 操作流程，這是一個專注於 Alpha 動態和視覺認知負荷分析的開源 EEG 代理。其目標是實用的：讀者應能夠安裝該代理，運行 EEG 預處理和質量控制，生成 Alpha 動態圖，執行受試者內部的休息/任務視覺認知負荷比較，運行公共迷你數據集分析並將其與參考驗證摘要進行比較，啟動在線儀表板，從外部應用調用實時 API，並使用 LLM 解釋層來解釋質量風險。現有的 EEG 工具包提供了出色的離線分析，但組建一個實時的、質量門檻的認知負荷管道通常需要手動橋接數據採集、自定義 QC、Alpha 特徵提取和網絡 API；這個教程填補了離線到在線的空白。該教程使用了一個質量門檻的工作流程：下游的 Alpha 和工作負荷指標僅在預處理和 QC 門檻後計算，而不是直接從原始 EEG 中計算。在包含的迷你數據集驗證中，該代理處理了 18 次錄音，生成了 10 次受試者內部比較，在 10 個對比中觀察到 7 次與任務相關的後部 Alpha 抑制，估計了受試者內部重複性的初步證據，並基準測試了本地在線 API 的延遲。該教程旨在為希望從 EEG 文件到實時視覺認知負荷原型的研究人員、開發者和應用團隊提供透明的路徑。
2606.26518.author: Zhiyuan Xu et.al.
2606.26518.authors: Zhiyuan Xu, Yueqing Dai, Junling Li, Junwen Luo
